overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a character in Western attire exploring a foggy Victorian estate garden. The character walks through a metal trellis, descends into manicured gardens with ornate fountains and gazebos, and traverses curved stone staircases connecting different levels of the estate.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered garden walkway with metal trellis alongside Victorian mansion

events.description: character enters the covered metal trellis walkway from the mansion side path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the mansion porch and entering the covered trellis walkway lined with flowering plants

entered.detail: large wooden estate house with stone columns and wraparound porch
arched metal framework covered in vines forming a covered garden passage
tall red brick boundary wall with stone coping
manicured green hedges lining the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks alongside a grand Victorian mansion with stone columns, approaching and entering a covered metal trellis walkway. The path is narrow and enclosed by the arched metal framework covered in vines, with flowering bushes visible along the sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: open formal garden with manicured hedges and central gazebo

events.description: exits the covered trellis into the open garden area
descends stone stairs from the trellis exit into the lower garden level

agents.ego_description: exiting the trellis, descending a short flight of stone stairs, and walking through the formal garden grounds

entered.detail: sweeping curved staircase with stone balustrades leading up to the mansion balcony
ornate metal framework gazebo with dome roof situated in the garden center
large oak trees draped with hanging Spanish moss creating a canopy overhead

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the trellis into an open formal garden, descending stone stairs into the lower grounds. A large metal dome gazebo stands to the right while a grand curved staircase rises on the left, with oak trees draped in Spanish moss visible in the misty background.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated mansion porch with stone balustrades overlooking garden

events.description: begins ascending the curved stone staircase toward the upper balcony
reaches the top of the stairs and begins walking along the covered balcony

agents.ego_description: climbing the sweeping curved stone staircase and walking along the upper mansion balcony overlooking the garden

entered.detail: ornate stone railing with decorative posts lining the staircase and balcony

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the grand curved stone staircase, passing ornate stone balustrades, and reaches the elevated mansion balcony. From this vantage point, the metal dome gazebo is visible below in the garden center, framed by the misty oak trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: central garden courtyard with tiered fountain and cobblestone paths

events.description: descends the curved staircase on the opposite side of the balcony into the garden center
approaches the central tiered fountain while walking across the cobblestone courtyard

agents.ego_description: descending the curved staircase on the garden side, then walking across the cobblestone courtyard toward the central tiered fountain

entered.detail: multi-tiered stone fountain with water basins situated in the garden center

segments.scene_description: The character descends the curved staircase into the central garden courtyard, leaving the mansion balcony behind. Walking across the wet cobblestone paths, the character approaches a large tiered stone fountain while the metal dome gazebo recedes to the left, framed by manicured hedges and misty oak trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the enclosed corridors of a Victorian estate into the expansive, misty depths of its formal gardens. It begins alongside a grand mansion with stone columns, moving through a narrow, vine-covered metal trellis walkway lined with flowering bushes. As the character emerges from the trellis, the scene opens into a lower garden where the camera descends stone stairs past a metal dome gazebo and oak trees draped in Spanish moss. The perspective then shifts upward as the character ascends a grand curved staircase with ornate balustrades to reach an elevated balcony, offering a wide view of the gazebo nestled in the mist. Finally, the camera descends back into the central courtyard, gliding across wet cobblestone paths toward a large tiered stone fountain while the gazebo and manicured hedges recede into the background.
